test.create_query: CREATE TABLE test_json_all_paths_with_values (json JSON) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO test_json_all_paths_with_values SELECT materialize({json_sample}::JSON) FROM numbers(1000000)
test.query: SELECT JSONAllPathsWithValues(json) FROM test_json_all_paths_with_values FORMAT Null
